title: Implement a tree protection program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a tree protection program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine implementation requirements of the tree protection program

pcs.text: Receive and interpret tree protection plan and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive and interpret tree protection plan and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive and interpret tree protection plan and specifications.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of first aid equipment and emergency procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of first aid equipment and emergency procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid equipment and emergency procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and access tools, equipment and materials required to implement program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access tools, equipment and materials required to implement program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access tools, equipment and materials required to implement program.

pcs.text: Determine, schedule and allocate tasks to work team, allowing for contingencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine, schedule and allocate tasks to work team, allowing for contingencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine, schedule and allocate tasks to work team, allowing for contingencies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine implementation requirements of the tree protection program

elements.title: Prepare site for tree protection

pcs.text: Identify location of tree protection zone from site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location of tree protection zone from site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location of tree protection zone from site plan.

pcs.text: Select, prepare, and carry out pre-operational and safety checks, on tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare, and carry out pre-operational and safety checks, on tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare, and carry out pre-operational and safety checks, on tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Survey the tree protection zone and delineate specified boundaries according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey the tree protection zone and delineate specified boundaries according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey the tree protection zone and delineate specified boundaries according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Install protective barriers and signage according to tree protection plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install protective barriers and signage according to tree protection plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install protective barriers and signage according to tree protection plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare site for tree protection

elements.title: Install tree protection measures

pcs.text: Identify requirements for trunk, branch and root protection from tree protection plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify requirements for trunk, branch and root protection from tree protection plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify requirements for trunk, branch and root protection from tree protection plan.

pcs.text: Select and assemble materials and equipment required to install tree protection measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and assemble materials and equipment required to install tree protection measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and assemble materials and equipment required to install tree protection measures.

pcs.text: Construct and install protection measures specified in the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct and install protection measures specified in the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct and install protection measures specified in the program.

pcs.text: Inspect completed protection measures and take remedial action where out-of-specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect completed protection measures and take remedial action where out-of-specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect completed protection measures and take remedial action where out-of-specification.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Install tree protection measures

elements.title: Monitor protection program

pcs.text: Monitor tree health during scheduled program period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor tree health during scheduled program period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor tree health during scheduled program period.

pcs.text: Assess effectiveness of protection measures during the scheduled period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess effectiveness of protection measures during the scheduled period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess effectiveness of protection measures during the scheduled period.

pcs.text: Implement remedial action where tree health has been compromised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement remedial action where tree health has been compromised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement remedial action where tree health has been compromised.

pcs.text: Dismantle and remove protection measures and fencing at conclusion of scheduled period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dismantle and remove protection measures and fencing at conclusion of scheduled period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dismantle and remove protection measures and fencing at conclusion of scheduled period.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Update records and report tree protection outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update records and report tree protection outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update records and report tree protection outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor protection program

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
